message:
fix(ci): run tests single-threaded to avoid mutex poisoning

Tests that modify CWD use a shared mutex. When run in parallel, if one
test panics while holding the lock, subsequent tests fail with PoisonError.
Running with --test-threads=1 ensures proper serialization.

Also removed doc tests step since aadc is a binary crate (no lib target).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -59,10 +59,8 @@ jobs:
         run: cargo build
 
       - name: Run unit tests
-        run: cargo test --verbose
-
-      - name: Run doc tests
-        run: cargo test --doc
+        # Use single thread to avoid mutex poisoning from tests that change cwd
+        run: cargo test --verbose -- --test-threads=1
 
   coverage:
     name: Coverage
